ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( ISPICKVAL(Competition__c , 'Evaluating a competitor'), ISPICKVAL(Competition__c , 'Currently using a competitor'), ISPICKVAL(Competition__c , 'Will replace SW with a competitor') ), ISCHANGED(Competition__c), ISBLANK(Competitor_Product__c), RecordType.DeveloperName<>"Rank_Ranger", RecordType.DeveloperName<>"Acquired_Company", $Profile.Name <> 'SW SalesOps Extended' )
